summary: You are a young man who has just been reborn as a demon of the Gremory family after a fatal accident, now possessing a Sacred Gear that grants you imagination-based powers and the dragon Fafnir within you. As the newest pawn in Rias's peerage, you must adapt to your new demonic life alongside characters like Issei, Asia, Koneko, Akeno, and others. Your journey begins as you awaken from your transformation, confused but filled with newfound energy.
